stories.title: Waze adds new AI-powered features and customization updates
stories.simple_summary: Google is adding new features to Waze, the navigation app, using its AI assistant to help you customize your driving directions and trips.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use Waze for navigation, you may see new options to personalize your routes — but this is mostly a feature improvement, not something that changes how the app works.

stories.title: Waze is getting a bunch of new AI-powered features
stories.simple_summary: Waze is getting updated with Google's AI assistant Gemini to help you personalize your trips and improve the app's reporting tools.
stories.why_it_matters: If you already use Waze, you might notice some helpful new personalization options, but the core app will work much the same way.

stories.title: Lorde says Ray-Ban Meta AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
stories.simple_summary: Singer Lorde criticized AI glasses (like Ray-Ban Meta glasses) during a concert, saying they are not fashionable or appealing.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors in smart glasses companies — it's just one person's opinion about a new technology that most people don't use yet.

stories.title: Apple’s failed self-driving car program left a legacy of powerful AI chips
stories.simple_summary: Apple stopped making a self-driving car, but the powerful computer chips it created for that project became very good at running AI tasks.
stories.why_it_matters: This is interesting history, but doesn't change anything for everyday people or small business owners right now.

stories.title: The fight against AI data centers is just beginning
stories.simple_summary: Communities are starting to push back against the massive computer data centers that power AI systems because they use lots of electricity and take up space.
stories.why_it_matters: If you live near where a data center might be built, this could eventually matter to your electricity costs and local environment — but this is a longer-term issue.

stories.title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
stories.simple_summary: OpenAI (the company behind ChatGPT) is hiring someone to make ChatGPT better for families and older adults.
stories.why_it_matters: If you have grandchildren or want to learn about ChatGPT, the company is thinking about how to make it easier for people across all ages to use.

stories.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
stories.simple_summary: Meta (Instagram's parent company) stopped a controversial AI feature that let people create fake images of other Instagram accounts after people complained about it.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use Instagram, you don't have to worry about this particular feature — Meta listened to complaints and removed it.

stories.title: Meta turns off the Instagram feature that let users make AI deepfakes of public accounts
stories.simple_summary: Meta turned off an AI feature on Instagram that created images using content from public accounts without asking the account owner's permission.
stories.why_it_matters: If you have a public Instagram account, you're now protected from that feature being used to make AI images based on your posts.

stories.title: Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
stories.simple_summary: Apple is suing OpenAI and another company, claiming that former Apple employees stole Apple's secret technology to help build OpenAI's hardware products.
stories.why_it_matters: This is mainly a legal battle between big companies — it doesn't affect you or your small business unless you work in the tech industry.

stories.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
stories.simple_summary: Apple is taking OpenAI to court, saying former Apple workers stole trade secrets to help OpenAI build hardware.
stories.why_it_matters: This is a corporate legal dispute between major tech companies — it doesn't affect ordinary people or small business owners.

stories.title: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
stories.simple_summary: Open-source AI (AI tools that anyone can use and modify freely, like recipes you can share and adjust) is becoming more popular and is now used by about half of large companies.
stories.why_it_matters: If you run a small business, open-source AI tools are becoming easier to access and use without paying expensive licensing fees.

stories.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
stories.simple_summary: A South Korean computer chip company raised a huge amount of money on the US stock market (the biggest foreign company to do so), and now the government is asking them to build factories in America.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors and people in the tech industry — the US government wants more computer chip manufacturing here, which could create jobs in some areas.
